Media Update + INFO FOR PREMIUM USERS
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 24th May, 2005 at 21:53 GMT
  
Hey, just letting everybody know; the premium downloads are down at the moment because we are testing out a new download system & server we're going to put into place at the end of this week (give or take a few days). We're just doing some last minute minute tweaking of scripts etc.... In the mean time we have combined both the new premium and free server's bandwidth to give free users improved download speeds.

As of the end of the week the free user's download speeds will be roughly half what they are at the moment as only the bandwidth of the free user's server will be available, premium users will be able to download at high speed (Up to 10Mbps) again and get their hands on more anime; roughly 300GB, including high resolution dbz episodes.

So; hopefully you will be happier with these new download speeds....The new free user's server costs twice as much as it did before but gives a 2.5x speed increase, the new premium user's server has two 250GB hard disks allowing us to provide you with ALOT more anime.

When the new system is in place at the end of this week premium users will need to transfer over their accounts. All premium users will have free access for one month as compensation for this downtime. Check back at the weekend for details.

PLEASE KEEP VOTING: SEE POST BELOW
Time To Vote
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 23rd May, 2005 at 10:45 GMT
  
Hey, as you have probably noticed the site hasn't been updated for a while...we've been trying to decide how to move the site forward, in particular the site's media (What everyone comes to download). We're now able to purchase some slightly faster servers; this means faster speeds if we have a fixed ammount of content, but if the site is to be updated regularly, the ammount of people downloading will also increase; pushing the download speeds back down to what they are at the moment.

This brings me to present the two options two options for the site's immediate future:

1. DB/DBZ/DBGT Media Only (And maybe one other series which is changed each month) - Reasonable Speed Downloads

2. Lots of Anime Media - Poor Download Speeds.

Please vote on which of the two you would prefer >>> Look to the right.
Long Post
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Thursday 31st March, 2005 at 18:01 GMT
  
Hey, Sorry I havn't posted in ages; I've been snowed under with work...I'm currently doing my AS Levels (Those who live in the uk will know what i'm on about.) I've put up some full metal alchemist episodes, unfortunately they're only available to premium members at the moment as we've run out of diskspace on the standar media server. I'll upgrade the hard-disks on both of the servers soon so that I'm able to upload more media.

V5.....I'm sorry to say that the release of v5 is going to have to be delayedd untill the end of July. It had gotten off to a cracking start, however both the designer and myself underestimated how much work actually needed to be done. Both of us are now extremely busy and will not be able to re-commence work untill june. Sorry for the dissappointment, but we thought it would be better to wait rather than released something rushed and half-done a bit earlier. I intend to keep to my word; It will be the best layout you have ever seen.
Update
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 16th March, 2005 at 18:11 GMT
  
Hey, sorry for the lack of updates recently, i;ve been really busy with v5 and with school work. This weekend I will be putting up some new episodes and will post an update about version 5 of the site.
Standard Media Server Down
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 12th March, 2005 at 11:36 GMT
  
Hey, we're experiencing a few technical problems with the standard media server, we hope to have it back online within 24 hours. Sorry for any inconvenience.
IMPORTANT: Premium Membership Data Gone
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 23rd February, 2005 at 18:47 GMT
  
Sorry, but I accidently deleted the access file for the premium server. If you are a premium member, simply send an e-mail to jamjarface@hotmail.com stating your paypal e-mail address; put 'premium' as the subject and i'll have your account up and running again pronto.
Media Updates
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 18th February, 2005 at 13:17 GMT
  
Hey, I've added all the latest naruto episodes, some trigun episodes and some rahxephon episodes to the downloads section; please enjoy. Also, I thought I might let you know dbgt v5 is approximately 30% complete and we still intend to release it some time in march. I guarantee you it will be the best looking anime site layout you have ever seen. Check back soon for more updates.
Website Back Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 8th February, 2005 at 13:11 GMT
  
Hey, I'm extremely sorry for all the downtime we just experienced; while doing some routine maintainance we encountered a few unexprected errors and had to re-install a few things on the server, poor response times from the datacenter only extended the time we had to wait for things to be done. All those who have a premium membership will have their subscription time increased by one week to compensate. Again i'm extremely sorry about this; in the future we will orgonise a backup server and domain so there is not so much downtime. On saturday i'll be putting up some new media so stay tuned.
Samurai X & Samurai Champloo Episodes Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Sunday 23rd January, 2005 at 19:07 GMT
  
Hey, sorry for the lack of updates; I've been tied down by school work for the last few weeks and have been working on the new version of dbgt (rebirth 05) which you can read about in the forums. I have uploaded episodes from Samurai X and Samurai Champloo; they are both great animes.
Final Fantasy Unlimited & Samurai 7 Episodes Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Tuesday 11th January, 2005 at 19:10 GMT
  
Hey, I've just put up some final fantasy unlimted episodes and some samurai 7 episodes. Please enjoy...Stay posted as I will be putting up kenshin episodes at the weekend.
